snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! 👀


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent’s Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

#clashofclans #hammerjam #seasonofupgrades

snippet.title: UNTV: NEWSBREAK | April 2, 2021
snippet.description:
- China, muling sinabing bahagi ng kanilang teritoryo ang Niue Reef
- DILG at DSWD, naglabas na ng guidelines sa pamamahagi ng P1K ayuda sa NCR+
- Publiko, binalaan kaugnay ng mga pekeng gamot



Subscribe to our official YouTube channel, https://bit.ly/2ImmXOi

Be the first to know about the latest updates on COVID-19 pandemic, lockdowns, community quarantine, new normal, and Serbisyong Bayanihan. 

We Serve the People. We Give Glory To God!

FlipTop Kru Corp. is a self-produced events and artist management company with its first product in the FlipTop Battle League. The FlipTop Battle League is the Philippines’ first premier – and the world’s most-viewed – rap battle league. It is popularly credited for the resurgence and widespread acceptance of hiphop culture in the Philippines since its inception in February 2010, and continues to champion all other hiphop elements in its variety of events and online content. It is home to the country’s top Hiphop talents and houses divisions in the main island groups of Luzon, Visayas, and Mindanao.

snippet.title: TURNING 36 PART 2: UNBOXING GIFTS | Heart Evangelista
snippet.description:
My first unboxing video is here! Plenty of my favorite brands like Kate Spade, Bally, Massimo Dutti and so much more gifts for my 36th birthday from SSI. Enjoy! ♥️

LOVE MARIE ONGPAUCO-ESCUDERO (known in the Philippine entertainment industry as Heart Evangelista) started her career at the age of 13 as a commercial model and actress. Her 20 years of hard work paved the way to numerous acting and hosting projects and awards. Through the years, she has evolved from being a professional actor and television host to a sought-after international and local brand endorser, sold-out visual artist, best-selling author, fashion influencer, beauty icon, and entrepreneur. She is one of the country’s most recognized celebrities, and advocates for children’s health and education, individuals with special needs, and animal welfare. She wishes to share these passions with the world through this platform. 

SSI Youtube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCCqb9jA89Cz77BFKEcEQpFQ
SSI Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ssilifeph/
SSI Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/SSILifePH/

She is one of the country’s most recognized celebrities, and advocates for children’s health and education, individuals with special needs, and animal welfare. She wishes to share these passions with the world through this platform.

snippet.description:

snippet.title: Taylor Swift ft. Maren Morris - You All Over Me (From The Vault) (Official Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Official lyric video for “You All Over Me” (Feat. Maren Morris) (Taylor’s Version) [From The Vault] – off her upcoming Fearless (Taylor’s Version) album. Pre-order the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion. Get the song here: http://taylor.lnk.to/yaom
►Subscribe to Taylor Swift on YouTube: https://ts.lnk.to/subscribe 

►Exclusive Merch: http://taylorswift.lnk.to/store
►Follow Taylor Swift online:
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylorswift 
Facebook: http://facebook.com/taylorswift 
Tumblr: http://taylorswift.tumblr.com 
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylorswift13 
Snapchat: http://snapchat.com/add/taylorswift
Website: http://www.taylorswift.com 
►Follow Taylor Nation Online
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylornation 
Tumblr: http://taylornation.tumblr.com 
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylornation13
Official Lyrics:

Once the last drop of rain has dried off the pavement
Shouldn't I find a stain, but I never do
The way the tires turn stones, on old county roads
They leave ‘em muddy underneath 
Reminds me of you
You find graffiti on the walls of old bathroom stalls
You know, you can scratch it right off 
It's how it used to be
But like the dollar in your pocket that's been spent and traded in
You can't change where it's been
Reminds me of me

I lived, and I learned
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
I’ve still got you all over me

The best and worst day of June
Was the one that I met you
With your hands in your pockets
And your ‘don't you wish you had me’ grin
But I did, so I smiled, and I melted like a child
Now every breath of air I breathe reminds me of then

And I lived, and I learned 
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
I’ve still got you all over me

I lived, and I learned 
And found out what it was to turn around
And see, that we 
Were never really meant to be
So I lied, and I cried 
And I watched a part of myself die
Cause no amount of freedom gets you clean
I’ve still got you all over me
I’ve still got you all over me
Still got you all over me
#taylorswift #youalloverme #marenmorris #fearlesstaylorsversion

Music video by Taylor Swift performing You All Over Me (Taylor’s Version) (From The Vault) (Lyric Video). © 2021 Taylor Swift

http://vevo.ly/YkrN0X

เนื้อร้อง/ทำนอง : อัจฉริยา ดุลยไพบูลย์
เรียบเรียง : ชลทัศน์ ชาญศิริเจริญกุล

Digital Download *1232323
Spotify | iTunes | JOOX

จะรักฉันอย่างนี้ อย่างนี้ ตลอดไปใช่ไหม
อีกสิบปีก็ยังจะรัก ใช่หรือเปล่า

เธอว่าอนาคตโลกเรามันจะเป็นอย่างไร
อะไรจะเปลี่ยนแปลงแค่ไหน
ฉันว่าอนาคตโลกเราคงเปลี่ยนไปมากมาย
แต่มีสิ่งหนึ่งจะเหมือนเดิม

จะตัวติดเธอไม่ว่าเธออยู่ที่ใด
ถึงจะเบื่อเธอก็ห้ามไปรักใคร
รักกันแล้วเธอก็ห้ามมาเปลี่ยนใจ
อยู่ด้วยกันไปนานๆ อย่าเปลี่ยนไป

ปีใหม่ วาเลนไทน์ ทุกปีจะอยู่กับเธอ
ถ้าฉันแก่ ก็จะแก่ไปพร้อมๆเธอ
ถึงเป็นลุง ก็จะเป็นลุงที่รักแค่เธอ
Forever นานเท่าไรยังคู่เธอ

จะรักฉันอย่างนี้ อย่างนี้ ตลอดไปใช่ไหม
อีกสิบปีก็ยังจะรัก ใช่หรือเปล่า
วันเวลาอาจทำให้ใครเปลี่ยนไปยกเว้นเรา
โลกหมุนเท่าไรไม่หยุดรักเธอ 

Ten years, twenty years, thirty years later
baby, you and me will be together

snippet.title: ENGSUB【大章鱼 Big Octopus】深海巨兽基因变异重组！ | 动作/冒险/灾难 | YOUKU MOVIE | 优酷电影
snippet.description:
【大章鱼 Big Octopus】深海巨兽基因变异重组！ | 动作/冒险/灾难 | YOUKU MOVIE | 优酷电影
类型：动作 / 冒险 / 灾难
导演：项华祥
主演：刘牧 / 赵茜 / 张皓承 / 程玲 / 谢志顺 / 林斯耀 / 颜华山 / 许秀菁 / 林美芬 / 周雪婷

简介：海岛渔民邵风和朋友一起在海上意外捕获一只形态奇异的小章鱼，从而引来了基因公司老板和另外一股神秘集团的追踪。邵风与科学研究者女友子墨也被迫卷入这场风波，一齐遭到了巨型变异章鱼对人类的攻击。最终邵风与子墨联手，破坏了人类贪婪的计划，帮助小章鱼重新回归海洋。

类型：动作 / 冒险 / 灾难

snippet.title: 강승윤(KANG SEUNG YOON) - '아이야 (IYAH)' M/V
snippet.description:
강승윤(KANG SEUNG YOON) - '아이야 (IYAH)'

아 난 왜 이럴까?
내일은 잘하자
애써 맘을 다잡아봐도
자꾸만 작아진다

야 시간아 좀만
천천히 가라
요즘 부쩍 널 따라가기가
조금씩 벅차다

시간이 지나면 지날수록
세상은 내게
더 많은 걸 강요해
나 하나도 힘든데
나보고 어쩌라고

난 아직 아이야이야
우리 엄마 눈엔
보이는 게 다 아니아니야
아직 어린데
실수 좀 하면 어때

난 아직 아이야이야
모진 세상 속에
부담주지 마이야이야
나도 사람인데
어떻게 다 잘해

아 또 이렇게 난
제자리 걸음마
뗐다 생각하고 뒤돌면
한숨만 날 기다린다

야 동생아 좀만
천천히 와라
널 마주치기에 아직
내 모습이 초라하다

시간이 지나면 지날수록
세상은 내게
더 많은 걸 강요해
나 하나도 힘든데
나보고 어쩌라고

난 아직 아이야이야
우리 엄마 눈엔
보이는 게 다 아니아니야
아직 어린데
실수 좀 하면 어때

난 아직 아이야이야
모진 세상 속에
부담주지 마이야이야
나도 사람인데
어떻게 다 잘해

먹고 싶어 먹은 나이가 아닌데
아직 내게 술은 쓰기만 한데
열일곱에 내가 어제처럼 선명한데

난 아직 아이야이야
우리 엄마 눈엔
보이는 게 다 아니아니야
아직 어린데
실수 좀 하면 어때

난 아직 아이야이야
모진 세상 속에
부담주지 마이야이야
나도 사람인데
어떻게 다 잘해

snippet.title: Suez Canal reopens after giant stranded ship is freed - BBC News
snippet.description:
Traffic has resumed in the Suez Canal after a giant, stranded container ship blocking it for nearly a week was finally freed by salvage crews.

Tug boats honked their horns in celebration as the 400m-long (1,300ft) Ever Given was dislodged on Monday with the help of dredgers and tug boats.

Hundreds of ships are waiting to pass through the canal which links the Mediterranean to the Red Sea via Egypt.

It is one of the world's busiest trade routes.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: ROSÉ「On the Ground」スッキリ独占パフォーマンス【スッキリLIVE】
snippet.description:
『スッキリ』で放送された あのパフォーマンスを もう一度！
今や世界中で大人気！
韓国のガールズグループ「 BLACKPINK(ブラックピンク)」の
メインボーカル「ROSÉ(ロゼ)」がスッキリにリモート出演。
3月12日にソロデビューを果たしたばかりのROSÉが、
海外エンタメコーナー「WEニュース」で
圧巻のパフォーマンスを披露してくれました！！

今回、パフォーマンスした楽曲は
ソロデビューシングル「-R-」に収録されている「On the Ground」。
ROSÉ本人が作詞にも参加したこの曲は、自身の過去と向き合い、
「常に高みを目指してい一生懸命頑張ってきたけれど、
本当に大切な価値は自分の中にあった」という想いを歌った楽曲です。

この曲は、アメリカ、ブラジル、スペイン、フランス、シンガポールなど、
51の国と地域のiTunesソングチャートで1位を獲得！
「ビルボードグローバル200」チャートでも1位を記録！！
Music Videoは韓国女性ソロアーティスト史上最短で
1億再生を突破するなど、数々の記録を打ち立てています。

『スッキリ』のためだけに撮影された、独占SPパフォーマンス。
生放送で見逃した方や、何度でも見たい方のために、
期間限定で公開します！

★チャンネル登録よろしくお願い致します★
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC45neOFhT2ZI6k7zYshxkkA/featured?sub_confirmation=1
◆日テレ「スッキリ」公式番組ホームページ
https://www.ntv.co.jp/sukkiri/
◆スッキリ公式ツイッター
https://twitter.com/ntv_sukkiri
◆スッキリ公式インスタグラム
https://www.instagram.com/ntv_sukkiri/

【ROSÉ(ロゼ)】
韓国大手プロダクション YG ENTERTAINMENTが輩出した
"アジアに舞い降りたガールズクラッシュグループ・BLACKPINK"で
メインボーカルを務める。

BLACKPINKは、2016年8月8日に韓国でデビューショーケースを行い、
同日に「WHISLE」「BOOMBAYAH」でデビュー！
日本では、2017年7月に新人としては異例のデビューショーケースを
日本武道館で開催し、20万件以上の申込みが殺到し、話題沸騰に。
 
楽曲を公開するたび、大きな話題をよび、今やアジアだけでなく、
アメリカ最大級の音楽フェスティバル「コーチェラ・フェスティバル」への出演や、
世界16か国22都市でワールドツアーを行うなど、世界中で活躍しています！

メンバーは、
JENNIE(ジェニー／Vocal, Rap)、LISA(リサ／Rap)
JISOO(ジス／Vocal)、ROSÉ(ロゼ／Vocal)の4人。
JENNIEに続いて、グループから2人目のソロデビューとなりました！

▼BLACKPINK 公式ホームページ
https://ygex.jp/blackpink/
▼BLACKPINK  OFFICIAL Twitter
https://twitter.com/ygofficialblink
▼BLACKPINK  OFFICIAL YouTube Channel
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOmHUn--16B90oW2L6FRR3A

snippet.channelTitle: 日テレ「スッキリ」公式チャンネル
tags: 日テレスッキリ公式チャンネル

localized.title: ROSÉ「On the Ground」スッキリ独占パフォーマンス【スッキリLIVE】
localized.description:
『スッキリ』で放送された あのパフォーマンスを もう一度！
今や世界中で大人気！
韓国のガールズグループ「 BLACKPINK(ブラックピンク)」の
メインボーカル「ROSÉ(ロゼ)」がスッキリにリモート出演。
3月12日にソロデビューを果たしたばかりのROSÉが、
海外エンタメコーナー「WEニュース」で
圧巻のパフォーマンスを披露してくれました！！

今回、パフォーマンスした楽曲は
ソロデビューシングル「-R-」に収録されている「On the Ground」。
ROSÉ本人が作詞にも参加したこの曲は、自身の過去と向き合い、
「常に高みを目指してい一生懸命頑張ってきたけれど、
本当に大切な価値は自分の中にあった」という想いを歌った楽曲です。

この曲は、アメリカ、ブラジル、スペイン、フランス、シンガポールなど、
51の国と地域のiTunesソングチャートで1位を獲得！
「ビルボードグローバル200」チャートでも1位を記録！！
Music Videoは韓国女性ソロアーティスト史上最短で
1億再生を突破するなど、数々の記録を打ち立てています。

『スッキリ』のためだけに撮影された、独占SPパフォーマンス。
生放送で見逃した方や、何度でも見たい方のために、
期間限定で公開します！

★チャンネル登録よろしくお願い致します★
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC45neOFhT2ZI6k7zYshxkkA/featured?sub_confirmation=1
◆日テレ「スッキリ」公式番組ホームページ
https://www.ntv.co.jp/sukkiri/
◆スッキリ公式ツイッター
https://twitter.com/ntv_sukkiri
◆スッキリ公式インスタグラム
https://www.instagram.com/ntv_sukkiri/

【ROSÉ(ロゼ)】
韓国大手プロダクション YG ENTERTAINMENTが輩出した
"アジアに舞い降りたガールズクラッシュグループ・BLACKPINK"で
メインボーカルを務める。

BLACKPINKは、2016年8月8日に韓国でデビューショーケースを行い、
同日に「WHISLE」「BOOMBAYAH」でデビュー！
日本では、2017年7月に新人としては異例のデビューショーケースを
日本武道館で開催し、20万件以上の申込みが殺到し、話題沸騰に。
 
楽曲を公開するたび、大きな話題をよび、今やアジアだけでなく、
アメリカ最大級の音楽フェスティバル「コーチェラ・フェスティバル」への出演や、
世界16か国22都市でワールドツアーを行うなど、世界中で活躍しています！

メンバーは、
JENNIE(ジェニー／Vocal, Rap)、LISA(リサ／Rap)
JISOO(ジス／Vocal)、ROSÉ(ロゼ／Vocal)の4人。
JENNIEに続いて、グループから2人目のソロデビューとなりました！

snippet.title: Suez Canal: Tugboats sound horns as Ever Given container ship 'fully refloated'
snippet.description:
The giant container ship that has been blocking the Suez Canal was fully floated on Monday afternoon, according to the Suez Canal Authority (SCA), with footage shared online showing the vessel moving in the channel.

After hauling the fully laden 220,000-ton vessel over the canal bank, the salvage team was pulling the vessel toward the Great Bitter Lake, a wide stretch of water halfway between the north and south end of the canal, where the ship will undergo technical inspection, canal authorities said.

Satellite data from MarineTraffic.com confirmed that the ship was moving away from the shoreline toward the center of the artery.

Read more here: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/03/29/suez-canal-ever-given-container-ship-partially-refloated/

Subscribe to The Telegraph on YouTube ► https://bit.ly/3idrdLH

Get the latest headlines: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/

snippet.title: UFC 260 Fight Timeline: Miocic vs Ngannou 2
snippet.description:
After their first fight in 2018, Stipe Miocic and Francis Ngannou went down different paths on the road to the rematch. Miocic became embroiled in a trilogy with Daniel Cormier, while Francis Ngannou overcame a disappointing performance at UFC 226 to put on an incredible streak of finishes. Don't miss Miocic vs Ngannou 2 on Saturday, March 27.

snippet.description:
Hey everyone. Here’s a little update about the news that came out regarding my wife. 
She is positive and I am negative. 
Thank you for all your prayers. 
I will skip any bike vlogs for this week as I think this is more important. 
Let’s keep praying for our countrymen...especially those who have the virus but have no one with them and very little finances to sustain themselves through this. God bless us all.

en.title: PREMIERE! Roy to the Rescue - Talking Tom and Friends | Season 5 Episode 18
en.description:
Things are looking up… Talking Tom is competing in a hot air balloon race! But when Roy Rakoon saves him from a nasty crash, Tom is horrified to realize that he owes his life to his worst enemy.

Talking Tom and Friends: Catch up on the adventure so far! 👍
Watch Season 1: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2DBcdm4eKchvBWCHzmkuE_WSXgPaS1Mn
Watch Season 2: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2DBcdm4eKci29KBnikbjXLGE1rgEPwHX
Watch Season 3: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2DBcdm4eKcg-GV-0fmRlaMd1IEzhcga1
Watch Season 4: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2DBcdm4eKcgUiSG3pCpxELwR9UEuRyu5
Watch Season 5: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2DBcdm4eKciFuOReqjU4C7abd8KCuo-X

Subscribe now so you don’t miss a minute of the fun! 👉 
https://www.youtube.com/c/talkingfriends

Join Talking Tom and Friends on the adventure of a lifetime! From alien invasions and robot rampages to zombie outbreaks, interdimensional portals, and trips into outer space, the fun never ends when this lovable group of best friends is around! 🤩🎬

☆ Watch most Popular videos here! https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2DBcdm4eKcibcWh20WxPjDjNmX5dPFGB

Talking Tom, Talking Angela, Talking Ben, Talking Hank Talking Ginger and Talking Becca are trying to make their mark on the world. 🌎 Whether they’re coming up with crazy world-changing inventions or making an epic new music video, they always dream big. 

Although things rarely seem to work out the way they planned, they always have each other’s backs. And it’s that friendship, optimism, and sense of fun that make their adventures just too amazing to miss! 😁

Find out more about your favorite friends in our super fun games! 👉 https://outfit7.com/applications/

For more fun...
▶︎ Go on an adventure with Talking Tom: https://www.youtube.com/TalkingTom

snippet.title: Sana'y Di Nalang | (c) Bandang Lapis | #AgsuntaSongRequests ft. Peds Casilihan
snippet.description:
“Sana’y di nalang kita nakilala, sana’y di nalang kita nakasama..” 🌖✨🌊

     sino dito ang nakaranas ng magmahal? siguro naman lahat tayo, dumating sa punto ng buhay natin na nahulog at napamahal tayo sa isang certain na tao na nagparamdam satin kung pano ang maging masaya, kung pano mawala lahat ng pangamba at takot sa puso natin at kung pano yung pagmamahal na halos wala nang natitira para sa sarili natin, kaso minsan.... di naman tayo pare parehas, minsan may happy ending, kaso minsan meron ding ending na di natin inaasahan, ung mismong taong nagturo sayo pano maging masaya, pano mawala ang takot, at pano magmahal ng lubus lubusan, minsan yun pa talaga ung taong mag bibigay nang doble doble at patong patong na sakit sa puso natin, na king minsan ay hinihiling nalang natin sa universe na sana di nalang natin na meet yung taong yun, pero sabe nga nila minsan may mga taong dadaan lang para turuan tayo at para mag grow tayo, diba? ikaw? meron kabang naiisip habang binabasa mo ito? o diba? andiyan ka parin naman, buhay  at humihinga kung di mo napagdaanan lahat ng napagdaanan mo, marahil wala ka sa punto ng buhay mo ngayon diba? maaaring nasaktan nila tayo pero what doesn’t kill you makes you stronger nga diba? kaya naman heto isa sa mga most requested songs sa aming Agsunta Song Requests heto ang aming version ng “Sana’y di nalang” ng @Bandang Lapis  kasama ang matagal na naming kaibigan at nakasama sa ilang agsunta jam sessions namin walang iba kundi ang maestro na si Peds Casilihan!

www.PedreelsMusicStudio.com
www.youtube.com/c/pedreelsmusicstudio
www.facebook.com/PedreelsMusicStudioOfficial/

Instagram
@PedsCasilihan

snippet.title: Stranded Ever Given back afloat in Suez Canal: Reports
snippet.description:
The Ever Given has been “successfully refloated” on the Suez Canal, according to Inchcape Shipping Services, a week after it ran aground in high winds blocking one of the world’s busiest shipping lanes.
“She is being secured at the moment. More information about next steps will follow once they are known,” the company said on Twitter.

Al Jazeera’s Alexi O'Brien reports.

snippet.title: TATAWA KAYO, MAIINIS AT TIYAK NA MAIIYAK!
snippet.description:
Part 1: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=45xq0CN4O68&t=25s

MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 16 MILLION Followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: Binibining Pilipinas inuudyukan na HUWAG NANG MAGPADALA ng Kandidata sa Miss Grand International
snippet.description: Malinaw ang sigaw ng sambayanang Pilipino sa Binibining Pilipinas Charities Incorporated at kay Madam Stella Araneta na itigil na ang pagpapadala ng ating mga kandidata sa Miss Grand International. Dahil sa ilang beses na umano tayong nananakawan ng korona sa nasabing Beauty Pageant ng Thailand, kagaya ni Samantha Bernardo at Nicole Cordovez, mas mabuti daw na wag nalang tayong magsayang ng panibagong binibini. May nagsasabi na kahit kailan daw ay hindi maaapreciate ng MGI Organization ang galing at talino ng mga kandidatang ipinanlalaban ng Pilipinas dahil bitter daw ang mga ito sa tagumpay ng ating bansa sa larangan ng Beauty Pageant. Pilipinas kase ang katangi-tanging bansa sa Southeast Asia na itinuturing na Power House. Pinas din ang pangalawa sa pinakamaraming  koronang naipanalo sa Big 4 Beauty Pageant.

localized.title: Binibining Pilipinas inuudyukan na HUWAG NANG MAGPADALA ng Kandidata sa Miss Grand International
localized.description: Malinaw ang sigaw ng sambayanang Pilipino sa Binibining Pilipinas Charities Incorporated at kay Madam Stella Araneta na itigil na ang pagpapadala ng ating mga kandidata sa Miss Grand International. Dahil sa ilang beses na umano tayong nananakawan ng korona sa nasabing Beauty Pageant ng Thailand, kagaya ni Samantha Bernardo at Nicole Cordovez, mas mabuti daw na wag nalang tayong magsayang ng panibagong binibini. May nagsasabi na kahit kailan daw ay hindi maaapreciate ng MGI Organization ang galing at talino ng mga kandidatang ipinanlalaban ng Pilipinas dahil bitter daw ang mga ito sa tagumpay ng ating bansa sa larangan ng Beauty Pageant. Pilipinas kase ang katangi-tanging bansa sa Southeast Asia na itinuturing na Power House. Pinas din ang pangalawa sa pinakamaraming  koronang naipanalo sa Big 4 Beauty Pageant.

snippet.title: HOSHI ‘Spider’ Official MV
snippet.description:
HOSHI ‘Spider’ Official MV
 
전 세계적인 인기를 얻고 있는 그룹 세븐틴의 멤버 호시가 첫 솔로 믹스테이프를 선보인다. 이번 믹스테이프 ‘Spider’ 작사, 퍼포먼스 등 제작 과정에 참여해 주체적이고 크리에이티브한 면모를 보여주고 있으며 아티스트 ‘호시’로서 한 걸음 더 나아간 모습으로 치명적이면서도 짜릿한 전율을 선사한다.

‘Spider’는 상대의 치명적인 매력에 빠져 헤어나오지 못하는 모습을 거미줄에 걸린 상황에 비유해 빠져나오기 힘든, 마치 덫과도 같은 상대의 매력을 섬세한 보컬과 센스 있는 가사 표현으로 담아냈다. 음원과 함께 공개된 뮤직비디오는 ‘덫’이라는 키워드 아래 돋보이는 화려한 영상미와 상대의 치명적인 매력에 점점 빠져드는 과정을 철봉을 이용한 독특한 퍼포먼스로 담아냈다. 명불허전한 ‘트렌디 퍼포머’로서 완벽히 자리매김한 호시는 이 곡의 듣는 매력과 함께 보는 매력까지 더하고 있다.

HOSHI, member of the self-producing idol group, SEVENTEEN, reveals his first solo mixtape. The leader of SEVENTEEN’s performance unit, HOSHI is not only a well-rounded performer with distinguished vocal and rap ability, but is also credited with choreographing various SEVENTEEN tracks throughout his career. Through HOSHI Mixtape Spider, HOSHI establishes himself as a choreographer, lyricist, and songwriter, showcasing his creative independence and growth as the artist “HOSHI”.

In “Spider,” HOSHI likens the feelings of falling for the deadly and inescapable charms of an individual to the desperate movements of a prey caught in a spider’s web. The accompanying music video and choreography visualize the state of being “trapped” and unable to escape from this maze-like dynamic. HOSHI’s sentimental vocals are backed by dreamlike pluck sounds and a restrained bassline, further heightening the tension in this thrilling game of spider and prey.

#HOSHI #호시
#Spider #스파이더

SEVENTEEN Official Homepage : http://www.seventeen-17.com
SEVENTEEN Official Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/seventeennews
SEVENTEEN Official Twitter : https://twitter.com/pledis_17
SEVENTEEN Official Instagram : http://www.instagram.com/saythename_17
SEVENTEEN Official Fancafe : http://cafe.daum.net/pledis-17
SEVENTEEN Official Weverse : https://www.weverse.io/seventeen

ⓒ Pledis Entertainment. All Rights Reserved

km.title: Dawn | Lethal Nexus ជំពូកទី ៣ | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
km.description:
Lethal Nexus ជំពូកទី ៣, Dawn, បានបង្ហាញខ្លួនហើយ។
តើ Beatrix និង កងកម្លាំងការពារទីក្រុង Eruditio អាចបញ្ចប់រឿងវិបត្តិនេះបានទេ?
តើនឹងមានរឿងអ្វីកើតឡើងនៅពេលដែល Beatrix ជួបគ្នាជាមួយនឹង Dr. Rooney?
តើអនាគតនៃមន្ទីពិសោធន៍ ១៧១៨ ក្លាយទៅជាយ៉ាងណា?
ចូលរួមទស្សនាវីដេអូនាពេលនេះ! កុំខកខានក្នុងការស្វែងរករបស់កំបាំងនៅក្នុងនោះផងណា៎!

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBLethalNexus

snippet.title: OPM icon na si Claire dela Fuente pumanaw na | Headline Pilipinas
snippet.description:
Pumanaw na ang OPM icon na si Claire dela Fuente ngayong March 30 dahil sa cardiac arrest, kinumpirma ng anak nitong si Gigo de Guzman.

Na-admit sa ospital ang mang-aawit matapos magpositibo sa coronavirus.

Composed by PSY, Jessi, 유건형, CuzD, johnjohn, JAE RO, 도나(DONNA), SPACE ONE

snippet.title: Stranded cargo ship in Suez Canal could 'take weeks' to free | DW News
snippet.description:
Japanese media are reporting that the owner of a huge container ship blocking Egypt's Suez canal aims to free it by Saturday. But experts are warning it could take weeks. More than a hundred and fifty ships are waiting to get in to what is one of the world's most important shipping routes, with hundreds more headed its way. A prolonged suspension of traffic in the Suez will almost certainly impact global trade, which has already been hit hard by the pandemic. The Suez Canal is a choke-point for world-trade. It connects Asia and Europe and sees 30-percent of the global container-shipping-volume every day.
Dredging teams worked through the night to try to clear the canal bed around the 200,000 ton ship. The stranded Ever Given is holding up around 10 billion dollars in trade every day it is stuck.
Diggers, tugboats, dredgers and a crack team of Dutchmen known as the special forces of salvage operations have been drafted in to help. It's thought containers may have to be offloaded to lighten the vessel - though one mistake could spell disaster.
According to maritime historian Sal Mercogliano, "The bow is basically in Asia, the stern's in Africa, and the middle is in the middle of the canal. And what you can't do is take a lot of weight off the ends and put a lot of what they call a 'sagging stress' on the vessel. You could conceivably crack the hull, cause an oil spill. But worse, catastrophically fracture the vessel in half, which would close the canal for months, if not years, to salvage a vessel of that type."
150 ships are caught in the traffic jam. Each passing day piles on the pressure for global trade routes, already struggling with the coronavirus pandemic.
Those involved have warned it could be weeks before the vessel is freed. Bad news for those stuck in the world's longest maritime tailback.


Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/user/deutschewelleenglish?sub_confirmation=1

snippet.title: Lethal Nexus: Impact | Cinematic Trailer | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
snippet.description:
New Hero x New Mode Cinematic has been released!
The new hero Beatrix is arriving with her "stunt doubles" to save the Eruditio. Now she is confronted with an army of Iron Sentries... For exciting and powerful battle scenes, check  Lethal Nexus Chapter 2: Impact right now!
Easter eggs: Could you find out what elements of the Survival mode we have hidden in the video? Check them out!

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBLethalNexus

tr.title: Ölümcül Bağlantı: Çarpışma | Sinematik Tanıtım | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
tr.description:
Yeni Kahraman x Yeni Mod Sinematiği yayınlandı!
Yeni kahraman Beatrix, Eruditio'yu kurtarmak için gizli silahları ile geliyor. Şimdi bir Demir Muhafız ordusuyla karşı karşıya... Heyecan verici ve göz alıcı savaş sahneleri için Ölümcül Bağlantı Bölüm 2: Çarpışma'ya hemen şimdi göz at!
Easter eggs: Videoda Hayatta Kalma modunun hangi elementlerini gizlediğimizi bulabilir misin? Kendine güveniyorsan hemen şansını dene!

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBÖlümcülBağlantı

ja.title: リーサルネクサス：衝撃 | トレーラー本編 | モバイルレジェンド
ja.description:
新ヒーロー×新モードの予告編が公開！
新しいヒーローのベアトリクスは、学者の城を救うために「スタントダブル」を持って到着した。今、彼女の前に鋼鉄の衛兵隊が立ち塞がる...エキサイティングでパワフルな戦闘シーンは、リーサルネクサス第2章「激突」をチェック！！
イースターエッグ：ビデオに隠されたサバイバルモードの要素を、あなたは見つけられるかな？いますぐチェック！

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBLethalNexus

vi.title: Lethal Nexus: Xung Kích | Trailer Điện Ảnh | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
vi.description:
Bản Điện Ảnh Về Tướng Mới x Chế Độ Mới đã ra mắt!
Vị tướng mới Beatrix chuẩn bị tiến bước giải cứu Eruditio cùng "bản sao thế thân" của mình. Giờ đây, cô nàng đang phải đối đầu với một đoàn quân Thiết Giáp Hộ Vệ... Để xem thêm những khung cảnh đối đầu hấp dẫn hơn, hãy xem Lethal Nexus Chương 2 ngay nhé!
Hỏi nhỏ chút: Bạn có thể tìm xem video có chứa những yếu tố nào về chế độ Sinh Tồn không? Trổ tài đi nào!

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBLethalNexus

ru.title: СМЕРТЕЛЬНЫЙ НЕКСУС: УДАР | ТРЕЙЛЕР | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
ru.description:
Новый герой и видео нового режима уже выпущено!
Новый герой, Беатрис, спешит на помощь Эрудитио вместе со своими "дублерами". Теперь ей будет противостоять армия Железных часовых... Смертельный Нексус, Глава 2: Удар представляет вам захватывающие сцены боёв, смотрите прямо сейчас!
Пасхалки: А вы сможете узнать, какие элементы режима Выживание скрыты в видео? Напишите в комментариях!

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBLethalNexus

ms.title: Lethal Nexus: Impact | Treler Sinematik | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
ms.description:
Wira Baharu x Sinematik Mod Baharu telah dilancarkan!
Wira baharu Beatrix telah tiba bersama-sama "pendua lagak ngeri" dirinya untuk menyelamatkan Eruditio. Kini dia berhadapan dengan bala tentera Iron Sentry... Bagi babak pertempuran yang menarik dan hebat, lihat Lethal Nexus Bahagian 2: Impact sekarang!
Kejutan tersembunyi: Bolehkah anda mencari elemen-elemen Mod Survival yang telah kami sembunyikan di dalam video? Lihatnya sekarang!

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBLethalNexus

pt.title: Nexus Letal: Impacto | Trailer Cinematográfico | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
pt.description:
Nova Heroína x Lançamento de Novo Modo Cinematográfico!
A Nova Heroína Beatrix está chegando com seus "dublês" para salvar o Erudito. Agora ela é confrontada com um exército de Sentinelas de Ferro... Para mais cenas de batalha emocionantes e poderosas, verifique "Nexus Letal - Capítulo 2: Impacto" agora mesmo!
Easter egg: será que você consegue descobrir quais elementos do modo Sobrevivência escondemos no vídeo?

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBLethalNexus

km.title: Lethal Nexus: Impact | Cinematic Trailer | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
km.description:
ឈុតឆាករឿងពីតួអង្គថ្មី x វគ្គថ្មី បានចេញផ្សាយហើយ!
តួអង្គថ្មី Beatrix នឹងមកដល់ជាមួយនឹងតួជំនួស "stunt doubles" ដើម្បីជួយសង្គ្រោះ Eruditio។ នាពេលនេះ នាកំពុងតែប្រយុទ្ធតទល់ជាមួយនឹងកងទ័ពនៃ Iron Sentries... សម្រាប់ឈុតប្រកួតដ៏រំភើប និង អស្ចារ្យ សូមចូលឆែមើល Lethal Nexus ជំពូកទី ២៖ Impact នាពេលនេះទៅ!
Easter eggs: តើអ្នកអាចរកឃើញវត្ថុសំខាន់ៗដែលយើងបានលាក់នៅក្នុងវគ្គ Survival mode នៅក្នុងវីដេអូនេះដែរឬទេ? មកចូលរួមទស្សនាទាំងអស់គ្នា!

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBLethalNexus

id.title: Lethal Nexus: Impact | Trailer Sinematik | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
id.description:
Sinematik Hero Baru x Mode Baru telah dirilis!
Hero baru Beatrix segera hadir dengan "Stunt Double"-nya untuk menyelamatkan Eruditio. Sekarang, dia dihadapkan dengan pasukan dari Iron Sentry... Untuk menyaksikan adegan pertempuran yang seru dan kuat, cek Lethal Nexus Chapter 2: Impact sekarang juga!
Easter Egg: Apakah Anda dapat menemukan elemen apa dari Mode Survival yang kami sembunyikan dalam video? Cek sekarang!

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBLethalNexus

ar.title: الرابطة المميتة: صدمة | العرض السينمائي | مواجهة الأبطال - MLBB
ar.description:
صدر العرض السينمائي للبطلة الجديدة x الوضع الجديد 
البطلة الجديدة بياتريكس تصل مع "خدعة الإزدواج" لإنقاذ الإيروديتيو. هي الآن في مواجهة جيش من الحراس المعدنيون... لمشاهد معركة مثيرة وقوية، تفقد الرابطة المميتة الجزء 2: صدمة!
بيض عيد الفصح: هل يمكنك معرفة عناصر وضع الصمود التي أخفيناها في الفيديو؟ تفقدهم الآن!

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBLethalNexus

snippet.title: TWICE JAPAN 8th SINGLE 『Kura Kura』Teaser NAYEON
snippet.description:
TWICE JAPAN 8th SINGLE『Kura Kura』（読み：クラクラ）を5月12日にリリース決定！

「Kura Kura」はTWICEのプロデューサーJ.Y. Parkが作詞を担当。
「君」に出会った瞬間、魔法にかけられ二人だけの世界に吸い込まれたかのように、「君」の魅力にクラクラするほど恋に落ちる。「君」しか見えなくなり、全身で夢中になる姿を歌った一曲として、想像の中での恋が少しずつ現実的な恋に変わっていく姿を表現した。
TWICEの日本の作品としては今までにない「愛」の形を歌い、益々成長しているリアルな彼女たちの姿が魅せられる楽曲。

#TWICE #KuraKura

---------------------------------
TWICE OFFICIAL FANCLUB ONCE JAPAN

snippet.title: Woman records on her phone as strange man stalks her through downtown Vancouver
snippet.description:
A Vancouver woman is speaking out about a frightening experience after she was followed closely by a strange man for more than half an hour.

Jamie Coutts filmed much of the encounter and said her stalker didn’t appear phased by the camera at all.

Coutts said in retrospect she should have phoned police, but that in the stress of the moment her priority was getting somewhere safe and staying ahead of her pursuer.

Coutts has since reported the incident to Vancouver police, who say they are investigating.

For more info, please go to https://globalnews.ca/news/7705868/frightening-video-man-follows-vancouver-woman/

snippet.description:

Lyrics:
Ooh

Balloons are deflated
Guess they look lifeless like me
We miss you on your side of the bed, mmm
Still got your things here
And they stare at me like souvenirs
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me, but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life?

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) No
(Ooh) No, no, no
(Ooh, ooh) Ooh, nah (Ooh)

I'm buildin' my hopes up
Like presents unopened to this day
I still see the messages you read, mmm
I'm foolishly patient (Foolishly patient)
Can't get past the taste of your lips (Taste of your lips)
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life? (My life)

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) Of me
(Ooh) 'Cause I think of you, think of you
(Ooh, ooh, ooh-ooh)

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia​​

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-​​...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram​​
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook​​
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial​​
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter​​
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube​​

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa​ #FutureNostalgia​ #Grammys
